statement.markdown: Given a list of coin denominations and an amount of money, return the minimum number of coins required to make change for the given amount.
statement.inputFormat: The function takes an integer array coins representing the coin denominations and an integer amount as input.
statement.outputFormat: The function should return the minimum number of coins required to make the given amount.
statement.notes: You may assume that there is always a way to make change for the given amount.
